title: Comparison of blood lactate and perceived exertion responses in two matched time-under-tension protocols
author: Vargas, Salvador
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The aim of this study was to compare the concentration of blood lactate [bLa-] and the sub-jective perception of exertion of trained men in a moderate repetition protocol (MRP) versusa high repetition protocol (HRP) equated for time under tension.
steps_raw: The aim of this study was to compare the concentration of blood lactate [bLa-] and the sub-jective perception of exertion of trained men in a moderate repetition protocol (MRP) versusa high repetition protocol (HRP) equated for time under tension.
